chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 321 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.01 & 26 2. For orders on CMA No.1096/2020 3. For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Mr. Najeebullah advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Today, brief is being held for applicant’s counsel and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
